items.headline: Man City vs. Arsenal LIVE: Arsenal retaliate immediately in tense title clash
items.description: The Premier League title race takes centre stage this afternoon as Manchester City host Arsenal in a game that could a long way to deciding where the trophy ends up in May, and you can follow it all with ESPN.

items.headline: USMNT's Florian Balogun scores in 8th straight game for Monaco
items.description: USMNT forward Folarin Balogun scored for the eighth straight league game as Monaco rallied to draw 2-2 with struggling Auxerre in Ligue 1 on Sunday.

items.headline: Premier League live updates: Early goals as Man City host Arsenal in key title clash
items.description: Premier League live updates: Early goals as Man City host Arsenal in key title clash

items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.

items.headline: Sultans survive Abbas and Hasan's onslaught to clinch high-scoring game
items.description: Kings bowled out for 196 in pursuit of 208, as Minhas (3 for 32) and Siddle (2 for 28) starred for Sultans

items.headline: Stability vs lack thereof as Gujarat Titans host Mumbai Indians
items.description: Rohit Sharma is fit again and expected to slot back into the top of the order for Mumbai Indians

items.headline: Betting tips, DFS picks for Sunday's NBA playoff games
items.description: Jim McCormick breaks down Sunday's NBA playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

items.headline: Bengals sign DT Dexter Lawrence to one-year, $28M extension
items.description: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and has signed a one-year, $28 million extension with Cincinnati, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Sunday.

items.headline: Everton 1-2 Liverpool: Virgil van Dijk grabs last-gasp winner in Merseyside derby - as it happened
items.description: Virgil van Dijk's header took three points for Liverpool in the first Merseyside derby at the Hill Dickinson.

items.headline: Late Virgil van Dijk header gives Liverpool crucial Merseyside derby win over Everton
items.description: Virgil van Dijk scored a stoppage-time header to win the first Merseyside derby and boost Liverpool's hopes of securing Champions League football next season.

items.headline: Morgan Gibbs-White hits hat trick as Nottingham Forest beat Burnley to pile misery on Spurs
items.description: Morgan Gibbs-White fired a 15-minute hat trick to move Nottingham Forest closer to Premier League survival after a 4-1 win over Burnley.

items.headline: Manchester City vs Arsenal: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
items.description: All you need to know ahead of Sunday's Premier League decider between Manchester City and Arsenal.

items.headline: Aston Villa earn last-gasp win over Sunderland in seven-goal thriller
items.description: Tammy Abraham scored a stoppage-time winner as Aston Villa took a huge step to securing Champions League football next season with a dramatic 4-3 victory over Sunderland.

items.headline: Rinku, Anukul, spinners earn first win for KKR
items.description: After Sunil Narine and Varun Chakravarthy bowled frugal spells to share five wickets, the KKR middle and lower order saw them home
